name: Hover Feather
preceding_figure_names: Hover Telemark, Natural Turn, Reverse Wave
following_figure_names: Three Step, Reverse Turn (just Reverse Turn with Feather finish, or 1-4 Reverse Turn check and Basic Weave), Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 3 of feather finish), Outside Swivel (check back after step 3 of Feather Step), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending
notes:
Note -- Body will overturn slightly to R on preceding Heel Pull. the footwork of the Heel Pull will be: 1. TH; 2 H; IE of foot, whole foot, then T of RF and pressure on IE of T of LF.
Follower notes: Body will overturn to R on preceding Brush step. The Lady will rise from the ball of LF at the end of the Brush step. The L heel does not touch the floor.
Preceding Figures: Hover Telemark, Natural Turn, Reverse Wave.
Following Figures: Three Step, Reverse Turn (just Reverse Turn with Feather finish, or 1-4 Reverse Turn check and Basic Weave), Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 3 of feather finish), Outside Swivel (check back after step 3 of Feather Step), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending.

steps.action: LF diag fwd preparing to step OP, L side leading
comments: Rise e/o preceding Heel Pull. Up
Compress right side, change angle through diagonal, allow head to prepare to go outside partner.

steps.action: RF diag back, R side leading
